title: Norwegian Berry Porridge
description: A warm and comforting Nordic-inspired porridge filled with sweet and tangy berries.

ingredients.name: Sweet Berries
ingredients.notes: Mixed berries such as blueberries, strawberries, and raspberries

instructions: Combine the porridge and milk in a saucepan.
Add the sugar and butter, and cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
Add the sweet berries to the porridge and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional berries if desired.
